title: Easy Item Tools [EIT]
description: This datapack adds 10 functions that add your items abilities like make it edible or set the max stack size to 64.
body:
## Description

This datapack adds 10 functions that add your items abilities like make it edible or set the max stack size to 64.
## Some Info

- You can get help from my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/gXbxjnpg6M).
- The mod has sometimes problems, so the datapack is recommended.
## Commands

<details>
<summary>Show the commands</summary>

_/function eit:drinkable_ - You can drink the item in your mainhand. (1.21.11 to 1.21.2)

_/function eit:edible_ - You can eat the item in your mainhand. (1.21.11 to 1.21)

_/function eit:glint_ - The item in your mainhand gets an enchantment glint. (1.21.11 to 1.21)

_/function eit:setrarity_common_ - Sets the rarity of the item in your mainhand to Common. (1.21.11 to 1.21)

_/function eit:setrarity_uncommon_ - Sets the rarity of the item in your mainhand to Unommon. (1.21.11 to 1.21)

_/function eit:setrarity_rare_ - Sets the rarity of the item in your mainhand to Rare. (1.21.11 to 1.21)

_/function eit:setrarity_epic_ - Sets the rarity of the item in your mainhand to Epic. (1.21.11 to 1.21)

_/function eit:stackable_to_1_ - The item in your mainhand gets stackable to 1. (1.21.11 to 1.21)

_/function eit:stackable_to_64_ - The item in your mainhand gets stackable to 64. (This won't work for tools like pickaxes (1.21.11 to 1.21)

_/function eit:unbreakable_ - It will make the item in your mainhand unbreakable. (1.21.11 to 1.21)

</details>
